rationale: Educ. Code §21.061 governs review of educator preparation program standards and has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions or school funding mechanics.
quote: The board shall, after consulting with appropriate higher education faculty and public school teachers and administrators and soliciting advice from other interested persons with relevant knowledge and experience, develop and carry out a process for reviewing and, as necessary, updating standards and requirements for educator preparation programs.
_note: No textual or operational overlap between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this educator preparation statute.
